states.name: Alice
states.title: The Eternal Dream
states.description: Alice is a pure spirit that was born from the collective unconscious of innocent young girls. She can enter and manipulate the dreams of all living beings. Hypnos scouted her while she was playing around in people's dreams. She thinks of Hypnos as wonderland's boss, and sees it as an older friend.

states.name: Alice
states.title: The Eternal Dream
states.description: Alice spends most of her time wandering around people's dreams, and she can materialize when she's with someone who remembers their dreams. Whether in dreams or reality she is always surrounded by a forcefield called "My Little Garden", and she can make this into many forms that she can use to fight. The constantly fidgeting, sharp-tongue rabbit beside her is a product of that power.

states.name: Alice
states.title: The Eternal Dream
states.description: "Hey, you're watching me again? You know, watching someone is the same as being watched. But becoming friends? That's not so easy. That's why I want to know, and I want you to know. From when my hair was a black bob, all the way until now. All of it. Ah, but this is so frustrating. It's not like a dream at all, is it? It's like being a game where you have to follow all the rules. So what are you waiting for? Hurry and choose me to come on your next adventure!"
